message.content:
Explore the story library feature in this codebase. I need to understand:

1. The `story_library` table schema — check `server/sql/stories.sql` for the CREATE TABLE
2. The backend service functions for library — check `server/services/storyInteractService.js` for toggle/get library functions
3. The API routes for library — check `server/routes/storyRoutes.js` for library endpoints
4. The client API functions — check `client/API/StoryApi.js` for library-related fetch calls
5. The existing hooks — check `client/src/components/Stories/hooks/useStoryData.js` and `useStoryMutations.js` for any library query hooks

I need the exact function names, endpoint paths, and what data they return. Be thorough — show the actual code for each function found.

content.text: I'll explore the story library feature systematically, checking each of the files you mentioned.

content.content:
1→-- =============================================
     2→-- Stories Feature – Full Schema Migration
     3→-- Run in Supabase SQL Editor
     4→-- =============================================
     5→
     6→-- 1. Stories table
     7→CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS stories (
     8→    id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
     9→    author_id UUID NOT NULL REFERENCES auth.users(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
    10→    title TEXT NOT NULL,
    11→    description TEXT DEFAULT '',
    12→    cover_url TEXT DEFAULT NULL,
    13→    status TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'ongoing' CHECK (status IN ('ongoing', 'completed', 'hiatus')),
    14→    tags TEXT[] DEFAULT '{}',
    15→    privacy TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'public' CHECK (privacy IN ('public', 'private')),
    16→    read_count INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
    17→    vote_count INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
    18→    created_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT now(),
    19→    updated_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT now()
    20→);
    21→
    22→CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_stories_author ON stories(author_id);
    23→CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_stories_status ON stories(status);
    24→CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_stories_privacy ON stories(privacy);
    25→CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_stories_created ON stories(created_at DESC);
    26→
    27→-- 2. Chapters table
    28→CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS chapters (
    29→    id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
    30→    story_id UUID NOT NULL REFERENCES stories(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
    31→    chapter_number INTEGER NOT NULL,
    32→    title TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'Untitled Chapter',
    33→    content JSONB DEFAULT NULL,
    34→    word_count INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
    35→    status TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'draft' CHECK (status IN ('draft', 'published')),
    36→    published_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NULL,
    37→    created_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT now(),
    38→    updated_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT now(),
    39→    UNIQUE(story_id, chapter_number)
    40→);
    41→
    42→CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_chapters_story ON chapters(story_id);
    43→CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_chapters_status ON chapters(status);
    44→
    45→-- 3. Story comments (paragraph-level)
    46→CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS story_comments (
    47→    id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
    48→    chapter_id UUID NOT NULL REFERENCES chapters(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
    49→    user_id UUID NOT NULL REFERENCES auth.users(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
    50→    parent_id UUID DEFAULT NULL REFERENCES story_comments(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
    51→    comment TEXT NOT NULL,
    52→    paragraph_index INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT -1,
    53→    paragraph_fingerprint TEXT DEFAULT NULL,
    54→    created_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT now()
    55→);
    56→
    57→CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_story_comments_chapter ON story_comments(chapter_id);
    58→CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_story_comments_paragraph ON story_comments(chapter_id, paragraph_index);
    59→CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_story_comments_parent ON story_comments(parent_id);
    60→
    61→-- FK to public.users so PostgREST can resolve users(...) joins
    62→ALTER TABLE story_comments
    63→ADD CONSTRAINT story_comments_user_id_public_fkey
    64→FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES public.users(id) ON DELETE CASCADE;
    65→
    66→-- 4. Story votes
    67→CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS story_votes (
    68→    id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
    69→    story_id UUID NOT NULL REFERENCES stories(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
    70→    user_id UUID NOT NULL REFERENCES auth.users(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
    71→    created_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT now(),
    72→    UNIQUE(story_id, user_id)
    73→);
    74→
    75→CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_story_votes_story ON story_votes(story_id);
    76→CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_story_votes_user ON story_votes(user_id);
    77→
    78→-- 5. Reading progress
    79→CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS reading_progress (
    80→    id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
    81→    user_id UUID NOT NULL REFERENCES auth.users(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
    82→    story_id UUID NOT NULL REFERENCES stories(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
    83→    chapter_id UUID NOT NULL REFERENCES chapters(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
    84→    scroll_position REAL DEFAULT 0,
    85→    last_read_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT now(),
    86→    UNIQUE(user_id, story_id)
    87→);
    88→
    89→CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_reading_progress_user ON reading_progress(user_id);
    90→
    91→-- 6. Story library (reading list / bookmarks)
    92→CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS story_library (
    93→    id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
    94→    user_id UUID NOT NULL REFERENCES auth.users(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
    95→    story_id UUID NOT NULL REFERENCES stories(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
    96→    added_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT now(),
    97→    UNIQUE(user_id, story_id)
    98→);
    99→
   100→CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_story_library_user ON story_library(user_id);
   101→
   102→-- 7. Auto-update triggers for updated_at
   103→CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION update_updated_at_column()
   104→RETURNS TRIGGER AS $$
   105→BEGIN
   106→    NEW.updated_at = now();
   107→    RETURN NEW;
   108→END;
   109→$$ LANGUAGE plpgsql;
   110→
   111→DROP TRIGGER IF EXISTS trigger_stories_updated_at ON stories;
   112→CREATE TRIGGER trigger_stories_updated_at
   113→    BEFORE UPDATE ON stories
   114→    FOR EACH ROW EXECUTE FUNCTION update_updated_at_column();
   115→
   116→DROP TRIGGER IF EXISTS trigger_chapters_updated_at ON chapters;
   117→CREATE TRIGGER trigger_chapters_updated_at
   118→    BEFORE UPDATE ON chapters
   119→    FOR EACH ROW EXECUTE FUNCTION update_updated_at_column();
   120→
